name: Standing Bench Calf Stretch
shortDescription: A static stretch using a bench to lengthen the calf muscles.
instructions: Stand facing a bench and place your toes up onto the edge with your heel on the ground. Lean forward slightly until you feel a stretch through your calf. Hold for the desired time and repeat with the other leg.
steps: Stand in front of a bench or sturdy surface.
Place the ball of one foot onto the edge, keeping heel on the floor.
Lean your body forward while keeping your knee straight.
formCues: Feel stretch in calf, not ankle
commonMistakes: Letting the foot roll inward or outward
breathing: Exhale as you relax into the stretch, inhale as you ease off.
